competition: DSH Hacks V1 · AI × STEM Education
tagline: The first STEM tutor that reads your attention field — not just your answers.
welcome_subtitle: Built on the Magnetic Field Model of Attention (MFA). Adapts difficulty and AI explanations to how you think, not only what you score.
ai_system_prefix: You are CogPace AI, a STEM mentor grounded in the Magnetic Field Model of Attention (MFA). F_att(r)=S/r² maps response patterns to cognitive engagement.

card_highlights.title: Attention-Aware
card_highlights.body: MFA computes engagement from response speed and accuracy — not just right/wrong.

card_highlights.title: Adaptive Difficulty
card_highlights.body: Bored? Harder. Overloaded? Simpler. Stay at your learning edge.

card_highlights.title: Live AI Tutor
card_highlights.body: Gemini explanations matched to OPTIMAL / UNDERLOADED / APPROACHING / OVERLOADED.
